hooks.command: FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -q 'features/.*\.zig$'; then CONTENT=$(jq -r '(.tool_input.new_string // "") + (.tool_input.content // "")'); if echo "$CONTENT" | grep -q '@import("abi")'; then echo '🚫 BLOCKED: @import("abi") in features/ causes circular imports. Use relative imports to services/shared/ instead.' >&2; exit 1; fi; fi

FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -q '\.zig$'; then if [ -x ./.cel/bin/zig ]; then ./.cel/bin/zig fmt "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true; elif [ -x "$HOME/.zvm/master/zig" ]; then "$HOME/.zvm/master/zig" fmt "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true; fi; fi

FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -q '/mod\.zig$'; then STUB=$(echo "$FILE" | sed 's/mod\.zig$/stub.zig/'); [ -f "$STUB" ] && echo "⚠ stub.zig exists alongside this mod.zig — remember to update $STUB to keep signatures in sync" || true; fi

FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -q '/build/options\.zig$'; then echo '⚠ build/options.zig changed — also update build/flags.zig (FlagCombo, validation_matrix, comboToBuildOptions)'; fi

FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -q 'feature_catalog\.zig$'; then echo '⚠ feature_catalog.zig changed — also update: registry/types.zig (isFeatureCompiledIn), config/mod.zig (Feature enum, Config field), stub_parity.zig'; fi

FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -q '/stub\.zig$'; then MOD=$(echo "$FILE" | sed 's/stub\.zig$/mod.zig/'); [ -f "$MOD" ] && echo "⚠ mod.zig exists alongside this stub.zig — verify $MOD doesn't need matching changes" || true; fi

FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -q '/build/flags\.zig$'; then echo '⚠ build/flags.zig changed — also check build/options.zig (enable field + CLI option)'; fi

FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -q '_test\.zig$' && [ -f "$FILE" ] && grep -q 'comptime.*{.*_.*=.*@import' "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; then echo '⚠ Found comptime { _ = @import(...) } — use test { _ = @import(...); } for test discovery (comptime does NOT discover tests)'; fi

FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -q '/src/abi\.zig$'; then echo '⚠ src/abi.zig changed — update examples/ and verify public API surface. Run: zig build test --summary all'; fi

FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -q '/tools/scripts/baseline\.zig$'; then echo '⚠ Editing baseline.zig (source of truth for CI). Verify new numbers match actual test output. Run /baseline-sync after.'; fi

COMMAND=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if echo "$COMMAND" | grep -qE 'zig build.*(feature-tests|test).*--summary'; then OUTPUT=$(jq -r '.tool_output // empty'); PASS=$(echo "$OUTPUT" | grep -oE '[0-9]+ pass' | head -1 | grep -oE '[0-9]+'); BASELINE_MAIN=$(grep test_main_pass tools/scripts/baseline.zig 2>/dev/null | grep -oE '[0-9]+'); BASELINE_FEAT=$(grep test_feature_pass tools/scripts/baseline.zig 2>/dev/null | grep -oE '[0-9]+'); if [ -n "$PASS" ] && [ -n "$BASELINE_MAIN" ] && [ "$PASS" != "$BASELINE_MAIN" ] && [ -n "$BASELINE_FEAT" ] && [ "$PASS" != "$BASELINE_FEAT" ]; then echo "⚠ Test count $PASS differs from baselines (main=$BASELINE_MAIN, feature=$BASELINE_FEAT). Run /baseline-sync if counts changed."; fi; fi
